description: Detects for-loops using signed int counters compared against unsigned size values. Simplified from Rust: flags all for_statement nodes without verifying the loop counter is signed or the condition involves an unsigned-returning function (strlen, sizeof, etc.). Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: For-loop detected -- verify that the loop counter type matches the comparison value type. Using a signed int counter with strlen(), sizeof(), or other size_t-returning values causes sign mismatch warnings and potential wrap-around bugs. Use `size_t` for size-based loops.
